quoteLast: Jack with his suitcase, Cynthia with Serena’s belongings and a bunch of flowers for the bride-to-be, watched anxiously down the street.
title: Cynthia Steps Out
author: Berry, Erick, 1892-1974

quoteFirst: When ten minutes of nine came, and then
quoteLast: , Theodora realized that never again, in all her life, could she say, 'I have never been tardy.'
title: Atlantic Narratives: Modern Short Stories; Second Series
